name: llm-wiki
description: Git-backed wiki engine — ingest structured knowledge, search it, surface contradictions. MCP tools + slash commands for external-LLM workflows.

commands.name: help
commands.description: List all llm-wiki slash commands, MCP tools, and workflow links

commands.name: init
commands.description: Set up llm-wiki — verify install, initialise a wiki repo, configure MCP

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Ingest a source into the wiki — two-step: wiki_context then wiki_ingest

commands.name: research
commands.description: Answer a question from the wiki using wiki_context

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Run wiki_lint, fix orphans, enrich contradictions, re-run lint

commands.name: contradiction
commands.description: Analyse and enrich contradiction pages using wiki_context and wiki_ingest
